creator: Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
I have made and uploaded a fixed port of "xshisen".
It follows the newest version of that.

ftp://ports.jp.freebsd.org/pub/incoming/ports-jp/games/xshisen-1.36-970305.tar.gz

xshisen is the Shisensho game for X.
Please enjoy.
Yukihiro Nakai <Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp>
